blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
